category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison — China export to Qatar.

title.en: China-to-Paraguay EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入巴拉圭：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入巴拉圭：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China EV charger documentation against Paraguay INTN conformity expectations, ANDE grid-connection and project approval, IEC 61851 safety, IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 connector interoperability, IEC 61000 EMC evidence, OCPP network integration, and 220/380 V 50 Hz grid context — versus China GB/T 18487.1-2023, GB/T 20234, and GB/T 27930 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与巴拉圭INTN合格评定预期、ANDE并网及项目审批、IEC 61851安全、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口互操作、IEC 61000 EMC证据、OCPP网络集成及220/380 V 50 Hz电网背景——对比中国GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234和GB/T 27930基线的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與巴拉圭INTN合格評定預期、ANDE併網及項目審批、IEC 61851安全、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口互操作、IEC 61000 EMC證據、OCPP網絡集成及220/380 V 50 Hz電網背景——對比中國GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234和GB/T 27930基線的差距對照。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers entering Paraguay, the practical gaps are INTN conformity expectations using IEC-family evidence, ANDE project-level technical approval for grid-connected installations, connector conversion from GB/T 20234 to IEC 62196 Type 2 for AC and CCS2 for DC, IEC 61851 safety evidence, IEC 61000 EMC and power-quality evidence, and OCPP or project-specified back-office integration for networked chargers. Paraguay operates on 220/380 V 50 Hz, nominally aligned with China, but ANDE connection terms, protection settings, metering, load management, Spanish documentation, and site commissioning still need project confirmation. A standalone Paraguay EVSE product certification rule could not be confirmed from official sources as of 2026-06-14; exporters should verify the current INTN route, HS code, ANDE approval path, charger type, and project-owner specification before shipment.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造电动汽车充电桩进入巴拉圭时，主要实务差距包括：以IEC体系证据满足INTN合格评定预期；并网安装需取得ANDE项目级技术批准；接口须从GB/T 20234转换为交流IEC 62196 Type 2和直流CCS2；补充IEC 61851安全证据、IEC 61000 EMC及电能质量证据；联网充电桩还需满足OCPP或项目指定后台集成要求。巴拉圭电网为220/380 V 50 Hz，名义上与中国一致，但ANDE接入条款、保护设置、计量、负载管理、西班牙语文件和现场调试仍须按项目确认。截至2026年6月14日，未能从官方来源确认巴拉圭存在单独适用于EVSE整机的强制产品认证规则；出口商应在出货前核实现行INTN路径、HS编码、ANDE审批路径、充电桩类型和项目业主规范。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造電動汽車充電樁進入巴拉圭時，主要實務差距包括：以IEC體系證據滿足INTN合格評定預期；併網安裝需取得ANDE項目級技術批准；接口須從GB/T 20234轉換為交流IEC 62196 Type 2和直流CCS2；補充IEC 61851安全證據、IEC 61000 EMC及電能質量證據；聯網充電樁還需滿足OCPP或項目指定後台集成要求。巴拉圭電網為220/380 V 50 Hz，名義上與中國一致，但ANDE接入條款、保護設置、計量、負載管理、西班牙語文件和現場調試仍須按項目確認。截至2026年6月14日，未能從官方來源確認巴拉圭存在單獨適用於EVSE整機的強制產品認證規則；出口商應在出貨前核實現行INTN路徑、HS編碼、ANDE審批路徑、充電樁類型和項目業主規範。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, INTN conformity scope determination, ANDE grid-connection approval, electrical-installation design, customs determination, public-charging licence, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, charge-point operators, designers, and installers should verify current Paraguay INTN standards adoption, ANDE technical requirements, IEC standard editions, Spanish documentation needs, and project-owner requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、INTN合格评定范围裁定、ANDE并网批准、电气安装设计、海关裁定、公共充电许可或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、充电点运营商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验现行巴拉圭INTN标准采纳情况、ANDE技术要求、IEC标准版本、西班牙语文件需求及项目业主要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、INTN合格評定範圍裁定、ANDE併網批准、電氣安裝設計、海關裁定、公共充電許可或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、充電點運營商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行巴拉圭INTN標準採納情況、ANDE技術要求、IEC標準版本、西班牙語文件需求及項目業主要求。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, utility, customs authority, electrical-installation authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
